Description
» You can create templates buffs for your character and style of play.
» Free fuctions heal and remove buffs.
» You can provide your pet buffs from templates.
Price for 1 Buff : *1 000 Adena*. | Time buff: *%object(Config,BBS_BUFFER_ALT_TIME)% minutes*.
Standart buffs for player. › List of skills allow your create personal scheme.
Standart buffs for servitor. › List of skills allow your create personal scheme.
Functions
Heal HP. (Only on peace zone) › Function of HP regeneration.
Heel MP. (Only on peace zone) › Function of Mana regeneration.
Heel CP. (Only on peace zone) › Function of CP regeneration.
Remove all buffs. › Fumction remove all character buffs.
Select target:
Standart buff scheme
Set for warrior.› Time: *%object(Config,BBS_BUFFER_ALT_TIME)% minutes*
Set for mage.› Time: *%object(Config,BBS_BUFFER_ALT_TIME)% minutes*
Enter name scheme

Personal buff scheme
